classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是全图左上方的6针动力连接器表格，列出'Pin'、'Function'、'COLOR'，并将1至6号针脚对应到'U'、'V'、'W'、'PE'、'Brake (+)'、'Brake (-)'及线色，属于动力相线、保护地和制动器接线定义。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域显示圆形6针连接器外形与针位编号，并标注型号'YL2046ZJ-Y'和'6 PIN'；该区域没有针脚功能、线色或接线对应关系，因此按连接器外形和物理针位示意归入机械尺寸类。

drawing_metadata.drawing_context_en: Circular 6-pin power connector face with pin cavity numbers visible.
drawing_metadata.drawing_context_zh: 圆形6针电源连接器端面，标有针位编号。

language_processing_rules.original_text_policy: Preserve visible source text exactly; no OCR-only or context-only text promoted to direct data.
language_processing_rules.unit_rule: No dimensional unit is visible in IMAGE 1; units are not assigned to pin identifiers.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: Six visible pin position identifiers: 1 through 6 on connector front face.
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 连接器端面可见6个针位编号：1至6。
dimension_records.engineering_notes_en: Pin numbers identify connector cavity positions, not dimensional measurements.
dimension_records.engineering_notes_zh: 针位数字用于标识连接器孔位，不属于尺寸标注。

frontend_table_records.specification: Six visible pin position identifiers: 1 through 6 on connector front face.

audit_table_records.normalized_specification: 连接器端面可见6个针位编号：1至6。

mounting_interface.en: No mounting dimensions or fastener data are visible in the target crop.
mounting_interface.zh: 目标裁剪图中未见安装尺寸或紧固件数据。

shaft_and_key_interface.en: No shaft, key, or keyway information is present in this connector-detail crop.
shaft_and_key_interface.zh: 该连接器局部图中未包含轴、键或键槽信息。

overall_envelope_and_clearance.en: No overall envelope or clearance dimensions are visible in IMAGE 1.
overall_envelope_and_clearance.zh: IMAGE 1中未见外形包络或间隙尺寸。

connector_considerations.en: The target crop shows a circular connector face with six numbered pin positions; connector model or pin assignment table text is not visible in IMAGE 1.
connector_considerations.zh: 目标裁剪图显示圆形连接器端面及6个针位编号；连接器型号或针脚定义表文字在IMAGE 1中不可见。

missing_or_unresolved_data.en: Connector type, mating model, electrical pin functions, orientation key details, and dimensions are not readable from the target crop.
missing_or_unresolved_data.zh: 连接器类型、对配型号、电气针脚功能、防呆键细节及尺寸无法从目标裁剪图读取。

unresolved_items.issue_en: Context indicates this region relates to a 6-pin power connector, but the target crop only visibly contains pin numbers.
unresolved_items.issue_zh: 上下文显示该区域与6针电源连接器有关，但目标裁剪图中仅能直接看到针位编号。
unresolved_items.impact: Do not record connector model, 6 PIN label, or pin table as direct IMAGE 1 text.

Corrected '$' to diameter symbol and normalized unilateral tolerance.

Connector label identifies the encoder connector on the top of the motor view.

Vertical diameter callout at shaft centerline specifies the shaft diameter tolerance.
Side view diameter callout specifies the mounting pilot/register diameter tolerance.
Leader in front view points to threaded mounting holes and combines thread size with depth.

Second front view angular dimension confirms 45 degree mounting hole layout.

Front view bottom dimension indicates symmetric mounting hole spacing of 150 in two directions.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Mounting interface includes Φ165±0.1 bolt circle, Φ130 +0/-0.04 pilot register, 4-Φ11 through holes, M8 deep 25 threaded holes, 45° angular layout, and 2-150 spacing.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Shaft interface includes Φ32 +0/-0.016 shaft diameter, 50 and 58±0.1 axial shaft dimensions, 63±1 front projection, plus key/keyway detail dimensions 10, 8, and 50.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Overall body-related dimensions include 174MAX height and 352±1.5 body length, with local 3.5 and 12 axial step/clearance dimensions.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Top labels identify a 6 pin motor connector and a 17 pin encoder connector.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: No explicit material, surface finish, or general tolerance block is present in this cropped region.

unresolved_items.reason: Tiny isolated OCR character near a 45° callout appears to be noise or part of geometry, not a reliable standalone engineering annotation.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框是整张外形图右下角的环境条件参数表，包含温度、湿度、环境介质和安装海拔等机械产品使用条件；未出现扭矩转速曲线或连接器针脚定义。在给定类别中最接近机械图纸通用尺寸与安装条件信息。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框位于完整图纸标题栏左侧的未注公差栏，包含可见文字'UNLESS OTHERWISE SPECIFIED'、'TOLERANCES:'、小数位公差'.X ±0.5'、'.XX ±0.25'、'.XXX ±0.1'、角度公差'±0°30′'以及单位'UNIT: mm'，属于机械图纸尺寸与公差说明。

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
